description: Constraint types for energy site selection. Hard constraints are exclusionary; soft constraints are penalties in scoring.

constraints.name: High Flood Risk Zone
constraints.description: Exclude areas with flood risk index >= 0.7 for ground-mounted infrastructure

constraints.name: Moderate Flood Risk Zone
constraints.description: Penalize areas with flood risk index >= 0.4 (requires mitigation measures)

constraints.name: Protected / Conservation Area
constraints.description: Exclude forests and wetlands from ground-mounted solar development

constraints.name: Minimum Solar Resource
constraints.description: Exclude areas with GHI below 1200 kWh/m2/year for solar PV

constraints.name: Steep Terrain
constraints.description: Penalize areas with slope > 15 degrees for ground-mounted solar

constraints.name: Grid Connection Distance
constraints.description: Use night lights as proxy for grid infrastructure proximity. Low values suggest remote areas requiring longer grid connections.

constraints.name: Dense Urban Area
constraints.description: Exclude very dense built-up areas (>80%) for ground-mounted solar

constraints.name: Informal Settlement
constraints.description: Flag informal settlements — may need community engagement approach, but also high-priority for energy access
constraints.note: Not a penalty — flagged for special consideration in business model design
